channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Drain completely blocked outside Sunnyside, 18th April
item.description:
Drain completely blocked outside Sunnyside
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Gloucester Road, Andoversford, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep circular pothole in middle of road, 17th April
item.description:
Deep pothole central on road at the beginning of Coniston Road (Windermere Road end) outside of numbers 1 and 2 Coniston Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coniston Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Number of potholes across road, 17th April
item.description:
Large number of potholes across carriage way causing cars to swerve or slow to a crawl. Very dangerous and needs urgent fixing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amount of potholes, 17th April
item.description:
A vast number of pot holes, large and deep in size across the whole carageway. Cars requiring to swerve around them causing danger to other drivers and pedestrians including school children as close to a school. Urgent issue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Church Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A barrier has been placed across the road blocking traffic in both directions. The road has been indicated as closed all week. It is unclear why the road needs to be shut or if this is official as there is only a small hole in the pavement. There has been little activity near the hole and the road has been left closed with an obstructing fence placed across the road., 17th April
item.description:
At the bottom of Harp Hill where it joins Priors Road and Hales Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Harp Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: 2 x potholes, 17th April
item.description:
On LH side when you drive in, next to pavement before No 40 house on left
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement seriously damaged by roots Pedestrians continually tripping here, 17th April
item.description:
Pavement is between the road and the front garden of 25 Thirlmere Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thirlmere Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 17th April
item.description:
They have closed the road despite finishing the works. It is just an inconvenience to the public and local businesses when you also factor in this evenings rush hour and Monday mornings rush hour. They have given access for pedestrians only. Why is this. Can this be pushed to be open?
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes in mini roundabout, 17th April
item.description:
Potholes have been here for over 6 months and are getting worse. This is urgent as you cannot get round the roundabout properly without hitting these.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Church Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 17th April
item.description:
Fway abrupt level 500mm x 300mm x 34mm STAT PLAN REQUIRED Fway closure TM required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 17th April
item.description:
Same place as last previous occasions
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 17th April
item.description:
Fway abrupt level 500mm x 300mm x 34mm STAT PLAN REQUIRED Fway closure TM required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 17th April
item.description:
Again please fix it properly this time
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 159, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken road work sign abandoned, 17th April
item.description:
What 3 words ///dwell.hidden.page Broken abandoned road sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairview Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham

item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Pothole in the road, 17th April
item.description:
